title: Keyboard Shortcuts + Undo/Redo Polish

tasks.title: Redo Stack Implementation
tasks.description: Add redo capability mirroring the existing undo architecture. Redo stack clears on any new action.
changes: Add state.redoStack = [] to state initialization
Modify saveUndo() to clear redoStack on new actions
Modify undo() to push current state onto redoStack before restoring
Add redo() function that pops from redoStack, pushes current to undoStack, then restores
Add Redo button in controls bar after Undo button
acceptance_criteria: Redo reverses the last undo operation
Multiple sequential undos can all be redone in order
Any new action (place, remove, rotate) clears the redo stack
Redo button is disabled when redo stack is empty
Redo button visible in controls bar with ↪️ icon

tasks.title: Keyboard Event Listener + Core Shortcuts
tasks.description: Add global keydown handler with guards for modals and input focus. Implement Space, R, Z/Ctrl+Z for undo, Shift+Z/Ctrl+Shift+Z for redo, N for night mode.
changes: Add document keydown event listener in init()
Guard: skip if target is input/textarea, or if save modal is open
Space → togglePlay() + e.preventDefault()
R → generateRandomTrack()
Z or Ctrl+Z → undo()
Shift+Z or Ctrl+Shift+Z → redo()
N → toggleNightMode()
Escape → close save modal if open, deselect tool if selected
acceptance_criteria: Space toggles play/stop
R generates random track
Z/Ctrl+Z undoes last action
Shift+Z/Ctrl+Shift+Z redoes
N toggles night mode
Escape closes open modal
Shortcuts don't fire when typing in save slot name input
Shortcuts don't fire when save modal is open (except Escape)

tasks.title: Quick-Select Track Tool (Number Keys 1-7)
tasks.description: Pressing 1-7 selects a track type from the palette. Clicking an empty grid cell then places that type with auto-connect rotation. ESC or pressing same key deselects.
changes: Add selectedTool variable (null or type string)
Map: 1=straight, 2=curve, 3=tjunction, 4=crossover, 5=bridge, 6=tunnel, 7=station
When selectedTool is set, highlight corresponding palette piece with a CSS class (.palette-selected)
Modify onGridDown: if selectedTool is set and cell is empty (or scenery for tracks), place selectedTool with auto-connect
If selectedTool is set and click is on occupied track cell, still rotate
ESC clears selectedTool
Starting a drag clears selectedTool
Add CSS for .palette-selected highlight
acceptance_criteria: Pressing 1-7 highlights the corresponding palette piece
Clicking empty cell places the selected track type
Auto-connect rotation works for keyboard-placed pieces
Pressing same number again deselects
ESC deselects
Starting a palette drag clears selection
Visual highlight on selected palette piece is clear and visible

tasks.title: Delete Key for Hovered Cell Removal
tasks.description: Track which grid cell the cursor is hovering over. Pressing Delete or Backspace removes that cell's contents.
changes: Add hoveredCell = null variable to track current mouse-over cell
Add mouseover/mouseleave tracking on grid cells
In keyboard handler: Delete/Backspace → handleRemoveCell(hoveredCell.row, hoveredCell.col)
Guard: only if hoveredCell is set and not playing
acceptance_criteria: Hovering over a cell and pressing Delete removes its contents
Backspace also works as Delete alternative
Works for track, scenery, and trains
Does nothing when not hovering over a cell
Does nothing during play mode

tasks.title: Keyboard Shortcuts Overlay
tasks.description: Add a ⌨️ button in controls that shows a modal listing all keyboard shortcuts.
changes: Add ⌨️ button in #controls bar
Add #shortcuts-overlay and #shortcuts-modal HTML (similar to save modal)
Add CSS for the overlay/modal styling
List all shortcuts in a clean two-column layout
Close on overlay click, close button, or ESC key
Add ? key as shortcut to open the overlay
acceptance_criteria: ⌨️ button visible in controls bar
Clicking opens a modal listing all shortcuts
All shortcuts are listed accurately
Modal closes via close button, overlay click, or ESC
? key opens the shortcuts overlay
Modal is readable and well-formatted

testing_focus: Verify all keyboard shortcuts work correctly
Verify shortcuts don't fire in text inputs (save slot names)
Verify redo correctly reverses undo operations
Verify redo stack clears on new actions
Check for conflicts with browser defaults (Ctrl+Z handled by browser too)
Regression: all existing drag-drop, play, save/load still work
Regression: night mode transitions still work
